response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the video content. The video consists entirely of a VTuber engaged in a monologue while cooking. There is instrumental background music throughout, but no vocal music tracks were detected. Consequently, no song metadata or lyric searches were conducted.
response.global_summary: A VTuber is chatting with her audience while demonstrating the preparation of a waterless spice curry.

scenes.description: The VTuber is talking to her viewers and cutting an onion as part of a cooking demonstration. Instrumental background music plays, but there is no vocal music.
